title: Terraform Skill Design
summary: Technical specification for Terraform Cloud skill wrapping HashiCorp MCP server with session-managed operations, HCP API fallback, and provider documentation lookup.
notes: Blends design planning (goals, non-goals, implementation plan) with technical specification (architecture diagram, API contracts, code implementation details, configuration tables). Status: Draft. Strong SPEC signals from system architecture, MCP client implementation, error handling contracts, and workflow API definitions.
